exploration_notes: The document covers the four major HCM subsystems by tracing source code across 24 files. ConnectionManagerImpl (conn_manager_impl.h/cc) implements Network::ReadFilter with lazy codec creation, ActiveStream per-request state, three-phase drain sequencing, overload management at codec/stream/keepalive levels, and multi-layer watermark flow control.
